FIELD.NAME: allowrepeat
FIELD.COMMENT: Allow users to participate in multiple rounds

FIELD.NAME: lobbyduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Default lobby duration in seconds

FIELD.NAME: questionpreviewduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Default question preview duration in seconds

FIELD.NAME: questionduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Default time to answer question in seconds

FIELD.NAME: questionresultsduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Default question results display duration in seconds

FIELD.NAME: maxpoints
FIELD.COMMENT: Default maximum points for correct answer

FIELD.NAME: minpoints
FIELD.COMMENT: Default minimum points for correct answer (slowest)

FIELD.NAME: questionformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Question format: 0=plain text with image, 1=rich text

FIELD.NAME: identitymode
FIELD.COMMENT: Participant identity mode: 0=real name, 1=optional alias, 2=required alias, 3=fully anonymous

FIELD.NAME: questiontype
FIELD.COMMENT: Type: multichoice, text, clickmap, etc.

FIELD.NAME: version
FIELD.COMMENT: Version number, increments with each edit

FIELD.NAME: questionconfig
FIELD.COMMENT: Type-specific settings (list of options, etc)

FIELD.NAME: islast
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 if this is the latest version of the question, 0 otherwise

TABLE.NAME: kahoodle_rounds
TABLE.COMMENT: Individual game rounds for kahoodle activities

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Round name/title

FIELD.NAME: currentstage
FIELD.COMMENT: preparation, lobby, questionpreview, question, questionresults, leaders, revision, archived

FIELD.NAME: currentquestion
FIELD.COMMENT: Current question number being displayed

FIELD.NAME: stagestarttime
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when current stage started

FIELD.NAME: timestarted
FIELD.COMMENT: When round actually started (lobby opened)

FIELD.NAME: timecompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: When round was completed

TABLE.NAME: kahoodle_round_questions
TABLE.COMMENT: Questions used in a specific round with version snapshot

FIELD.NAME: questionversionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Reference to kahoodle_question_versions.id

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Order of question in this round

FIELD.NAME: questionpreviewduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Override default, NULL means use activity default

FIELD.NAME: questionduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Override default, NULL means use activity default

FIELD.NAME: questionresultsduration
FIELD.COMMENT: Override default, NULL means use activity default

FIELD.NAME: maxpoints
FIELD.COMMENT: Override default, NULL means use activity default

FIELD.NAME: minpoints
FIELD.COMMENT: Override default, NULL means use activity default

FIELD.NAME: totalresponses
FIELD.COMMENT: Total number of responses collected. NULL until question is completed and stats are collected

FIELD.NAME: answerdistribution
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON with answer distribution (e.g., how many chose each option). NULL until question is completed and stats are collected

TABLE.NAME: kahoodle_participants
TABLE.COMMENT: User participation in rounds with custom display name and avatar

FIELD.NAME: displayname
FIELD.COMMENT: Custom display name for this round

FIELD.NAME: avatar
FIELD.COMMENT: Avatar identifier or path

FIELD.NAME: totalscore
FIELD.COMMENT: Total points earned in this round

FIELD.NAME: finalrank
FIELD.COMMENT: Final rank in this round

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: When user joined the lobby

TABLE.NAME: kahoodle_responses
TABLE.COMMENT: User responses to questions in a round

FIELD.NAME: roundquestionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Reference to kahoodle_round_questions

FIELD.NAME: response
FIELD.COMMENT: User's answer as JSON or text

FIELD.NAME: iscorrect
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 if correct, 0 if incorrect

FIELD.NAME: points
FIELD.COMMENT: Points earned for this response

FIELD.NAME: responsetime
FIELD.COMMENT: Time taken to answer in seconds

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: When response was submitted
